name: THE KITCHEN AT BEAR BUTTE GARDENS (SHARED KITCHEN)

violations.description: Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of. *Not all canned items for sale have had 3rd party testing completed.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. -Bathroom door was left open between use.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. -Employee milk stored in kitchen refrigerator.
General premises. — --Items throughout kitchen and store are stored on floor. *Should be stored in a more orderly fashion, 6 inches off of floor.
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
